_comment: TD Builder v0.2.0 client config template. Replace <RELEASE_ROOT> with the absolute path to this release folder (the parent of this MCP/ directory). IMPORTANT: 'command' must be the SAME interpreter the dependencies were installed into. The quick start installs them into a venv at <RELEASE_ROOT>/.venv, so point 'command' at that venv's python: <RELEASE_ROOT>/.venv/Scripts/python.exe on Windows, <RELEASE_ROOT>/.venv/bin/python on macOS/Linux. A bare 'python' resolves to the system interpreter, which does NOT have the deps (the server dies with ImportError) and may be an unsupported 3.14+ (chromadb has no 3.14 wheel). Register td-builder always; add td-builder-live only when TouchDesigner is open.
